'''竏嗜-th-g-d''' ('''kanathgedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illuminate|illuminate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illuminate|illuminate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜-th-g-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanathgedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinathgedoko|thinathgedoko]] || [[word:jinathgedoko|jinathgedoko]] || [[word:shinathgedoko|shinathgedoko]] || [[word:kinathgedoko|kinathgedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunathgedoko|thuthunathgedoko]] || [[word:jujunathgedoko|jujunathgedoko]] || [[word:shushunathgedoko|shushunathgedoko]] || [[word:kukunathgedoko|kukunathgedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunathgedoko|thunathgedoko]] || [[word:junathgedoko|junathgedoko]] || [[word:shunathgedoko|shunathgedoko]] || [[word:kunathgedoko|kunathgedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunathgedoko|thunathgedoko]] || [[word:junathgedoko|junathgedoko]] || [[word:shunathgedoko|shunathgedoko]] || [[word:kunathgedoko|kunathgedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonathgedoko|thothonathgedoko]] || [[word:jojonathgedoko|jojonathgedoko]] || [[word:shoshonathgedoko|shoshonathgedoko]] || [[word:kokonathgedoko|kokonathgedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonathgedoko|thonathgedoko]] || [[word:jonathgedoko|jonathgedoko]] || [[word:shonathgedoko|shonathgedoko]] || [[word:konathgedoko|konathgedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonathgedoko|thonathgedoko]] || [[word:jonathgedoko|jonathgedoko]] || [[word:shonathgedoko|shonathgedoko]] || [[word:konathgedoko|konathgedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦnathgedoko|thﾃｦnathgedoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦnathgedoko|jﾃｦnathgedoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦnathgedoko|shﾃｦnathgedoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦnathgedoko|kﾃｦnathgedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanathgedoko|thathanathgedoko]] || [[word:jajanathgedoko|jajanathgedoko]] || [[word:shashanathgedoko|shashanathgedoko]] || [[word:kakanathgedoko|kakanathgedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanathgedoko|thanathgedoko]] || [[word:janathgedoko|janathgedoko]] || [[word:shanathgedoko|shanathgedoko]] || [[word:kanathgedoko|kanathgedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanathgedoko|thanathgedoko]] || [[word:janathgedoko|janathgedoko]] || [[word:shanathgedoko|shanathgedoko]] || [[word:kanathgedoko|kanathgedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
